conflicts.field_or_topic: accident_cause / 사고기전 (injury mechanism): 계단 낙상 vs KB 재해원인 '무리한 동작'

sources.quote: 2024년 5월 5일 계단에서 넘어진 후 발생한 요통으로 내원
2024.05.05 내원 당일 돌계단에서 미끄러져 넘어지는 사고로 엉덩방아 찧고 허리 부딪힌 후,
사고(발병)일자          재해유형    일반상해     재해원인    무리한 동작

conflicts.resolution_note: Delegated-human verdict (Claude, delegated by Rekhet): accepted mechanism = 계단 낙상. Weight of evidence: two independent narrative sources agree (의료자문 p1 사고경위, 교보 현장심사 p4) with same-day MRI corroboration (2024-05-05 급성 압박골절); KB's '무리한 동작' appears only as a coded 재해원인 dropdown field on payment notices (pp6-7) with no narrative, and KB itself paid as 일반상해 on that basis — judged a claims-intake coding artifact, not a factual counter-account. Both values remain in this ledger per P6; downstream drafts must still note the KB coding exists, since 재해 성립 could theoretically be contested on it (flag carried in evidence_validation_result CHK-18).
